series_metadata.series_description: Contains the history of the formal discipline imposed on an employee. Formal disciplinary action that is imposed for just cause consists of: One or more written reprimands, a fine in an amount not to exceed five (5) days pay, and one or more days suspension. Prior disciplinary record is used to determine appropriate level for any future discipline.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Written reprimands are retained 24 months after the date of the reprimand if there has been no other discipline imposed during the past 24 months. Fines and suspensions are retained 36 months if there has been no other discipline imposed during the past 36 months. ; Paper: Retain hard copy until it has been scanned into EIR, then destroy, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
